Bash(python -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, ''.''\)
from main import app
from uvicorn import run
try:
    run\(app, host=''127.0.0.1'', port=8000, reload=False\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f''Server startup error: {e}''\)
    import traceback
    traceback.print_exc\(\)
")

Bash(python -c "
from todo import TaskManager
tm = TaskManager\(\)
# Test login with our existing test user
try:
    user_data = tm.login\(''newuser@example.com'', ''newpass123''\)
    print\(''Login successful!''\)
    print\(f''User ID: {user_data[""id""]}''\)
    
    # Test adding a task
    task = tm.add_task\(''Test from authenticated CLI'', ''Testing authenticated task creation''\)
    print\(f''Task added: {task.title}''\)
    
    # Test viewing tasks
    tasks = tm.view_tasks\(\)
    print\(f''Number of tasks: {len\(tasks\)}''\)
    
except Exception as e:
    print\(f''Error: {e}''\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\(''backend/todo_app.db''\)
cursor = conn.cursor\(\)

print\(''=== USERS ===''\)
cursor.execute\(''SELECT id, email, first_name, last_name, created_at FROM users;''\)
users = cursor.fetchall\(\)
for user in users:
    print\(f''ID: {user[0]}, Email: {user[1]}, Name: {user[2]} {user[3]}, Created: {user[4]}''\)

print\(''\\n=== TASKS ===''\)
cursor.execute\(''SELECT id, user_id, title, description, is_completed, created_at FROM tasks;''\)
tasks = cursor.fetchall\(\)
for task in tasks:
    print\(f''ID: {task[0]}, UserID: {task[1]}, Title: {task[2]}, Completed: {task[4]}, Created: {task[5]}''\)

conn.close\(\)
")
